inventionTitles.title: Cellulose formate containing composition for forming a resilient heat-convertible gel

section.content: A composition containing cellulose formate and a solvent system. At a temperature at least equal to a value Tf the composition is a solution, and at a temperature appreciably less than Tf. The composition is an elastic, thermoreversible gel. A process for preparing a regenerated cellulose article by the transformation of this composition. Gel spinning in order to obtain a fiber or a film. A regenerated cellulose fiber having an excellent resistance to fibrillation in particular, wherein the said fiber may be a monofilament fiber. These fibers or these films may be used in textile applications or in technical applications, for example for reinforcing other articles, particularly tires.

Can form the composition that contains cellulose formate of elastic heat reversible gelThe present invention relates to obtain the composition of regenerated fibre cellulose product, particularly fiber or film, also relate to the method and the cellulosic fibre itself that obtain these goods.

Wet production viscose glue and rayon (rayon) fiber is known for a long time, in the method the shaping of fiber in coagulating bath (coagutation bath) be by finish by the dehydration of electrolyte solution and aggegation that solvent extraction causes (referring to as " Cellulose Chemistry andist Applications ", Ed.T.P.Nevell and S.H.Zeronian, Ellis Horwood Limited, 1985, the 18th chapter; And " Physics and Chemistry of Cellulose Fibers ", P.H.Hermans, Elsevier, 1949, third part).This method has been used the step of a series of complexity, is characterized in fairly obvious aspect pollution.

Proposed variously with the method that to remedy this pollution defective be purpose, these are summarized below.

The method that oneself proposes is: for example described in US-A-4416698, US-A-4734239 and DD298653, Mierocrystalline cellulose directly is dissolved in tertiary amine N-oxide compound, particularly in the N-methylmorpholine N-oxide compound.The character of these solvents is easy decomposition, and formation can set off an explosion and cause the superoxide of cellulose degradation.And the fiber that is obtained by this method shows tangible fibrillation trend.

Know that cellulosic fibre can be by preparing cellulose dissolution in the mixture of N,N-dimethylacetamide (DMAC) and LiCl, the same as described in US-A-4302252 and the EP-A-178293.But this method needs activated cellulose in advance.

JP-A-60/199912 and JP-A-60/209006 have described the method for using the cellulose solution producd fibers in organic solvent, and described organic solvent contains the halo tetraalkyl ammonium compound.This method does not allow dissolved cellulose concentration to surpass 6%.

WO-A-85/05115 and patent families EP-B-179822 thereof and US-A-4839113 have described the method by the anisotropic solution production of cellulose manthanoate fiber of the cellulose formate (cellulose formate) in formic acid and 99% crystalline phosphoric acid, and these fibers can be regenerated.The method of this acquisition fiber is free of contamination, and so the characteristics of the regenerated cellulose fibre that obtains are the mechanical property height; Initial modulus and toughness (tenacity) height particularly.Yet the fiber that obtains in this way has very orderly structure and special form, and it has reflected the anisotropy characteristics of starting soln, and this makes these fibers be not suitable for being used for fabric.

WO-A-94/17136 has described a kind of regenerated cellulose fibre, and it is to obtain by the isotropic aqueous solution of cellulose formiate in appropriate solvent.Method described in this patent application is free of contamination, and can also obtain " specialty " fiber (rayon type) because it can obtain to be referred to as outside " weaving " fiber (viscose glue type), so be very flexible.Compare with the fiber of describing among the WO-A-85/05115, the characteristics of the fiber that is obtained particularly its structure are comparatively unordered, show bigger continuity from form in reverse direction.Yet its elongation at break value is medium under most situation, in some application, especially has trouble on textile applications.

The specific purposes of invention are by proposing a kind of composition that comprises derivatived cellulose, the described composition of a kind of usefulness obtains the regenerated fibre cellulose product, especially the method for fiber or film, and a kind of regenerated cellulose fibre remedies above-mentioned shortcoming or limits these shortcomings.

A kind of by composition of the present invention, it is characterized in that:

A) it contains cellulose formate and the system that is referred to as " solvent system " that can dissolve described manthanoate;

B) ---At least equaling T fTemperature under said composition be solution;

---Be starkly lower than T fTemperature under said composition be the elasticity heat reversible gel.

Prepare the method for regenerated fibre cellulose product by the present invention, it is characterized in that:

A) be under the temperature of solution in said composition, the composition that limits above changed into liquid target compound with desired article shape;

B) make described liquid target compound through the quenching of being heated by the quick cooling of described solution in the gelling medium, obtain the elasticity heat reversible gel, quench temperature is starkly lower than T f

C) goods of the described gel form of washing are removed whole or most of solvent systems;

D) Mierocrystalline cellulose of raw product again;

C) washing and dry so regenerated goods.

Be used for obtaining fiber or film especially by method of the present invention, it is by changing said composition, and especially extruding said composition in a) in above-mentioned steps becomes that liquid target compound with fiber or film shape finishes.

At least the regenerated cellulose fibre of being made up of a threads (filament) of the present invention is characterised in that it has following character:

A) cellulosic manthanoate group substitution value is used DS fExpression is expressed with %, satisfies following relation: 0＜DS f＜5;

B) from the form of the cross section of long filament, be successive basically to the center from periphery;

C) this long filament fibrillation not, or fibrillation hardly;

D) initial modulus of this fiber equals 500cN/tex at least, and elongation at break equals 5% at least, and its toughness equals 15cN/tex at least.

Especially, fiber of the present invention is a monfil, and its diameter is greater than 40 μ m, and its fiber number is greater than 2.0tex.

The invention still further relates to the regenerated fibre cellulose product that obtains by the inventive method, especially fiber and film, and the assembly that contains at least one fiber of the present invention and/or thin film, described assembly can be cable (cables), monofilament cable (monofilament cable) for example, ply yarn, or multifilament fiber, wherein said goods or assembly can be as hydridization or compound, that is to say to comprise of different naturely, and also can be not according to parts of the present invention.

Goods of the present invention and/or assembly can be used on the packing material in (as food packaging article), the textile industry especially, also can be used as industrial strongthener, as be used for strengthening the goods of making by rubber or plastic material, particularly be with, pipe and tire, the present invention also relates to these enhanced goods.

This solvent system preferably by at least a for cellulose formate be non-proton transfer solvent component (I) and at least a be that the component (II) of non-solvent forms concerning cellulose formate, the amount of described non-solvent, the total amount of described non-solvent equals 10% of solvent system gross weight at least in other words, equals 40% of solvent system gross weight at most.

Advantageously:

---Aprotonic solvent is selected from group (I), and it comprises alkyl sulfoxide, lactan, no cyclic amide, the ring type derivative of methyl substituted urea is arranged on nitrogen-atoms, and wherein said lactan and no cyclammonium can be that replace or last the replacements;

---Non-solvent component is selected from group (II), and it comprises water and alcohol.

The example of the compound of group (I) comprises γ-pyrrolidone, N-Methyl pyrrolidone, N-ethyl pyrrolidone, dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO), tetramethylene sulfoxide, N; dinethylformamide, N; N-N,N-DIMETHYLACETAMIDE, N-formyl morpholine, N-carbonyl pyrrolidine, ε-Ji Neixianan, N-methyl caprolactam, N-methylpent lactan, N-methylformamide, 1; 3-dimethyl-2-imidazolone, 1; 3-dimethyl-3; 4,5,6-tetrahydrochysene-2-pyrimidone.Methyl-sulphoxide is preferred.

Alcohol in the group (II) can be simple function group or multi-functional (comprising at least two functional groups), and 2-7 carbon atom preferably arranged on its main chain, and glycerine, ethylene glycol and propylene glycol are preferred.

Be aided with following non-limiting example and describe use unique accompanying drawing of the power-extension curve of the gel that the present composition obtains, the present invention can be more readily understood.I, used mensuration and test 1, to the mensuration 1.1 of the plain manthanoate of original fibers, the cellulosic polymerization degree of the plain manthanoate form of original fibers

The Mierocrystalline cellulose of these derivatived celluloses is by coming regenerated with Equivalent Hydrogen sodium oxide reflow treatment, and resulting Mierocrystalline cellulose washes with water and be dry, and its polymerization degree (representing with DP) is measured as follows:

Measure the intrinsic viscosity of cellulose materials by Switzerland standard SNV195598 (1970), but its concentration changes between 0.5-0.05g/dl, intrinsic viscosity is defined as follows

IV=(l/C) * Ln (t/to) wherein C represents the concentration of butt cellulose materials, t represents dilute polymer solution mobile time in Ubbelhode type viscosity agent, to represents the flowing time of neat solvent in this viscosity agent, and Ln is a natural logarithm, and described mensuration is carried out under 20 ℃.

Limiting viscosity [η] is that intrinsic viscosity IV is that zero extrapolation obtains to concentration.

Molecular-weight average MW calculates by the Mark-Houwink relation and provides: [η]=KM wα, wherein constant K and α are respectively K=5.31 * 10 -4, α=0.78, these constants are relevant with the solvent system that is used for measuring intrinsic viscosity.

These are worth by L.Valtasaari at document Tappi 486Provide in 27 (1965).

The polymerization degree (DP) defines with following formula:

DP＝(Mw)/162，

The 162nd, the molecular weight of this cellulosic basic structural unit.1.2, the substitution value (formylation degree) of the plain manthanoate of original fibers

Accurate weighing 400mg cellulose formate is also put into Erlenmeyer type flask, adds 50ml water and 4m Equivalent Hydrogen sodium oxide (1N NaOH).Under nitrogen atmosphere, 100 ℃, reflux half an hour; Mierocrystalline cellulose has just been regenerated from manthanoate like this.After the cooling, excessive sodium hydroxide is with decinormal hydrochloric acid (0.1NHCl) back titration.

The total percentage of esterified alcohol functional group in the substitution value of Ce Dinging (DS) the expression Mierocrystalline cellulose in this way, promptly when three alcohol functional group in the cellulosic structure unit all during esterification, DS=100%, and when 0.9 alcohol functional group is esterified, DS=30%.

The DS of Ce Dinging is the direct tolerance to the percentage ratio of the alcohol functional group that changed the formic acid ester group in the Mierocrystalline cellulose in this way.2, to mensuration 2.1, the T of composition fMensuration (gel melting temperature)

Under 100-130 ℃, the about 5g of the composition of solution form directly is injected in the Glass tubing of size 20mm * 10mm, and described Glass tubing at room temperature.Solution forms gel and has the shape that is suitable for Glass tubing after being cooled to envrionment temperature.With Glass tubing sealing and be placed upside down in thermostatically controlled oil molten in, the molten per minute temperature that makes it of heated oil raises 2 ℃.Because gel causes that in the tube wall melting gel sample begins to slide in pipe temperature is defined as melting temperature, i.e. T fThe precision of this mensuration is ± 3 ℃.After melting finishes, be starkly lower than T by being cooled to fTemperature, as be lower than T f50 ℃ temperature, composition is gelling again, that is to say, and gel is hot reversible.2.2, the mechanical property of gel

Under 100-130 ℃, with the mould under the composition injection room temperature of solution form, injection rate surpasses the required amount of mould of filling up.Mould is stainless steel.Its interior dimensions is 150 * 150 * 2.5mm, and its outside dimension is 180 * 180 * 7.0mm.

(stainless steel plate 180 * 180 * 5mm) is put on the mould immediately, and it can be removed excessive solution by pressure with a lid.Perforate is arranged to promote the removal of excess solution on the sidewall of mould.

The mould of building by this way is placed under pressure under the room temperature immediately, and the load that adds 5KN on mould to be removing all the other excessive solution, and the side edge of lid and mould is touched.

Mould was placed 24 hours under room temperature under load.In this state of cooling, solution gel.Only needed in mould, to take out just having obtained a gel piece material that mean thickness is 2.5mm when finishing in 24 hours.The thickness of this piece material is accurate to 1/10mm.

Downcut the thin slice that tension test is used with the punching machine that is referred to as Scott test thin slice punching machine from the gel piece material.The length overall of Scott test thin slice punching machine is 127 ± 0.01mm, and maximum width is 22.7 ± 0.05mm, and punching machine has a narrow middle body, long 25.4mm, and wide is constant 3.18 ± 0.03mm.Each piece material is cut into 5-6 test film in this way.

The gel test sheet of Huo Deing is at Zwick GmbH ﹠amp in this way; Co. resist on the 1445 type machines that (Germany) produces and stretch load until fracture, test conditions is as follows: with 5 crust (bar) pressure, (size 38 * 50.5mm) pneumatic clamps that flat mandible is arranged of 1KN pressure chamber control; Length is 80mm between folder, and pulling speed is 500mm/min; Temperature is 20 ℃, and relative humidity is 65%.The gel test thin slice is placed in the folder, and pre-drag is about 5-20cN, the central authorities of narrow part between folder of test thin slice.

Under these conditions, obtain power---the extension curve of characterize combinations at its gel phase.Power is unit with newton, and elongation is measured with %.The average magnitude of the absolute precision of the disruptive force value that is obtained is ± 6N that the average magnitude of the absolute precision of elongation is ± 12% when fracture.Then according to the nominal rupture stress of the mean value calculation gel test thin slice of the narrow district of test thin slice cross section before mean value of the disruptive force of measuring (5 times measure mean values) and the test.This cross section is defined as the width of stamping machine centre portions, and promptly 3.18mm and piece material are taken out back measured gel piece material average thickness value (mean value of 6 measurements, product mm) from mould.The value of nominal rupture stress is represented with MPa.2.3, the substitution value of cellulose formate in the composition

The composition cools of solution state so changes gel into to room temperature.In dispersing apparatus, wash with water at ambient temperature and from gel, extract solvent system, filter the back and wash again with acetone, the powder of acquisition with vacuum drying oven 40 ℃ of following dryings at least 30 minutes.

The cellulose formiate that accurate weighing 200mg so obtains, and put into Erlenmeyer type flask, injection 40ml water and 2ml Equivalent Hydrogen sodium oxide (1N NaOH).In nitrogen atmosphere, mixture heating up was refluxed 15 minutes.Mierocrystalline cellulose is regenerated by manthanoate.Cooling is back with the excessive sodium hydroxide of decinormal hydrochloric acid soln (0.1N HCl) back titration.

The total percentage of the cellulosic alcohol functional group of esterification in the substitution value of Ce Dinging (DSc) the expression composition in this way, that is to say, when three alcohol functional group in the cellulosic structure unit are all esterified, DSc=100%, when 0.9 alcohol functional group is esterified, DSc=30%.

The DSc value that this mode is measured is the direct tolerance to the percentage ratio of the alcohol functional group that is converted into the manthanoate base in the Mierocrystalline cellulose.3, to the mensuration 3.1 of regenerated fibre, the mechanical property of fiber

Term " fiber " is interpreted as or multifilament fiber at this, comprises the primary filaments of many minor diameters (low-titer) as known mode, or monfil, also is referred to as " monofilament ", comprises the long filament of single major diameter (high fiber number).Especially, monfil diameter of the present invention is greater than 40 μ m, and fiber number is greater than 2.0tex.

The fiber that term " moisture is regulated (conditioning) " should be understood to before its performance measurement is stored, described mensuration is to be undertaken by the European standard DIN EN20139 in September, 1992 (use a standard atmospheric pressure: 20 ℃ of temperature, relative humidity 65%).

The fiber number of fiber is measured by the German standard DIN53830 in June nineteen sixty-five, and fiber will be through damping in advance.At least three samples are measured, the long 50m of each sample, and the fiber of this length weighed.Fiber number is represented (the gram numbers of per 1000 meters fibers) with tex.

Otherwise indicated, according to the schedule of operation of describing among the German standard DIN53834, with ZWI CK Gmb H ﹠amp; 1435 or the 1445 type tensile testing machines that Co (Germany) produces (corresponding to German standard DIN51220,51221 and 51223 machine) are measured the mechanical property (toughness, initial modulus, elongation at break) of fiber.Fiber stands traction and surpasses original length 400mm, stands slight pre-protectiveness for multifilament fiber and reverses (being torqued into about 6 ° of corresponding helical angle).All results that provide are 10 mean values of measuring.

Toughness (7) and initial modulus (Mi) are all represented (centinewton/tex) with cN/tex.Elongation at break (Ar) is represented with per-cent.Initial modulus (Mi) is defined as the slope of the linear portion of power-extension curve, and it only exists after the standard preliminary draft of 0.5cN/tex.T, Mi and Ar measure the fiber of damping.3.2, the chemical property of fiber

Substitution value (the DS of regenerated fibre f) be to measure like this:

About 400mg fiber is cut into the small pieces of 2-3cm, puts into the Erlenmeyer flask, adds 50ml water and 1ml Equivalent Hydrogen sodium oxide (1N NaOH).Material mixed 15 minutes at ambient temperature.Excessive sodium hydroxide is with decinormal hydrochloric acid soln (0.1N HCl) titration.Measure the method for the substitution value (DS) of manthanoate raw material in pressing 1.2 sections, calculate the value of DSf, alcohol functional group changes into the percentage ratio of formic acid ester group in its representative regeneration back Mierocrystalline cellulose.3.3, fiber form

The form of the fiber basis long filament of being studied can detect with the optics polarizing microscope, and this long filament is placed between the linear analyzer and polariscope of intersection, and the axle of this long filament is parallel to the plane on analyzer and polariscope surface.This long filament also can detect with electron microscope.

At first, in its original state, promptly complete state is observed fiber down, then, makes them stand a series of progressive wearing and tearing and continues to observe.This wearing and tearing are finished with simple mode, for example, do not have cutting action but have the either large or small degree of the object of appropriate size ground to wipe and the surface of file fiber with one, as pin or the scraper with a rubber or tweezers.

The morphological analysis of the single long filament that carries out like this provides the information of they side direction cohesions (cohesion), i.e. their cohesions (perpendicular to the axle of long filament) in the horizontal.

Here, fiber is studied under their residing drying regimes, and they only contain a spot of water, and these water have constituted its residual natural humidity.3.4, water fibrillation test

To the fibrillation Research on ability of fiber, perhaps in other words they can be undertaken by the test that is called " test of water fibrillation " the research of the endurance of fibrillation, and this is that the swollen primary filaments in water of these fibers is carried out.

As known to, fibrillation is interpreted as the interior poly-loss in a part of region surface of the long filament considered.Mainly be that the vertically interior poly-loss of (promptly along silk axially) is owing to comprise the wiping on surface and the mechanical stress of file and cause, and be combined in swelling action in the water when (as in this test) when mechanical stress, its meeting is obviously increase thereupon.

Fibrillation is to show by the thin fibril that the surface at long filament occurs more or less, and the apparent and shape of these thin fibrils resembles very thin hair or extremely thin silk ribbon or fur.These thin fibrils, the thickness (as diameter) of primitive fiber or extremely thin fur is significantly less than the thickness of long filament, they form on described long filament, its coefficient normally at least 10 or 20, for example, this thickness is less than 1 micron or 1/10th microns, and its length is limited, for example from tens to hundreds of micron.Know that the fibrillation of cellulosic fibre can change to a great extent, this depends on its character and manufacture method.Particularly, the test of water fibrillation can be used for setting up a kind of classification between these fibers.

The fibrillation test that is generally used for cellulosic textile fibre is described in the following reference, i.e. the Chemiefasern/Textilindustrie of I.Marini etc., 43./95.Jahrgang, November, PP.879-883.

8 primary filaments are cut into long 200mm, join in the bottle of 25ml with 4ml distilled water again, and temperature is a room temperature.Utilize Salvis type agitator bottle to be stirred 24 hours with the rotating speed of 200rpm.At room temperature dry then these long filaments, and observe under the magnification of 200-2000 with scanning electronic microscope, this multiple depend on the diameter (for example, to the diameter of the silk usefulness 200 greater than 40 μ m) of long filament.Long filament before the surface condition of the long filament of handling in this way and the fibrillation test compares.

Document as above-mentioned I.Marini is specified, based on total visual evaluator of the long filament tested, can carry out different interfibrous classification by means of the fibrillation scale that is made of from 0 to 6 fibrillation mark (or degree).The production of II, fiber

Among all embodiment below,, all be to use spinning, that is to say by spinning nozzle and extrude production by composition of the present invention for obtaining to comprise the regenerated fibre cellulose product of multifilament fiber or monfil.1, the production of cellulose formate

Cellulose formate is by above mentioned WO-A85/0115, for example with the crystalline phosphoric acid preparation of Mierocrystalline cellulose, formic acid and 99%.

Use following schedule of operation, for example: cellulose powder (its humidity and ambient air moisture equilibrium) is added in the mixing tank that adds chuck with Z-shaped arm.The mixture that adds 99% crystalline phosphoric acid and formic acid then.The ratio of three kinds of components is as follows, for example: 16% Mierocrystalline cellulose; 51% ortho-phosphoric acid; 33% formic acid (all being weight %)

All raw material mixed about 2 to 4 hours, and mixing temperature maintains 10-20 ℃.Under these conditions, polymerization degree decline 20-30%, the variation of formic acid ratio can cause the change of substitution value (DS), and under these conditions, the DS value of acquisition is 40%-50%.

The cellulose formiate solution that this mode obtains is extruded with extrusion screw rod from the mixing tank that a Z-shaped arm is arranged, with form quenching in cold water (as 10 ℃) of the bar-shaped liquid of the about 0.5mm of diameter.Obtained the cellulose formate rod by aggegation and neutralization washing in this manner, and it is dry in warm air.Certain this method only is to quote as the mode of embodiment.According to different extrusion conditions, can obtain the rod of higher fineness, or even obtain the rough wearing fiber of cellulose formate staple form.By also producing film on the roller that for example solution is expressed into rolling press.2, the production of spinning component

By cellulose formate composition of the present invention is to obtain by these exsiccant cellulose formate rods are dissolved in the solvent system of being studied.

For example, can use the operation of following form:

Rod is cut into the long section of about 10mm, and preparation at room temperature earlier forms the mixture of the component of solvent system.In the rod and the reactor under the solvent system adding room temperature that cut.This reactor comprises the container of a bivalve, agitator, vacuum pipeline and a nitrogen inlet.

Mixture is warming up to 110 ℃ progressively, also stirs lightly simultaneously in about one hour.In this first step, can comprise the degassing step under the parital vacuum.In second step, continue down the isothermal dissolving at 120 ℃, and stir about 2-3 hour simultaneously, up to obtaining limpid, even and not containing the solution of bubble.Described second step can carry out in inert atmosphere.Certainly, this method is also only quoted as an example.Pointed temperature and time can have very big change according to mixture and the desired composition studied.3, the spinning of composition

In the reactor of Miao Shuing, temperature is higher than T in front fThe composition of (as 120 ℃) is the solution form, promptly is fluidic, uniform liquid form.These solution are transported to the spinning unit and deliver to spinning pump by applying nitrogen pressure.To extrude orifice or kapillary (for example n equals 1,26 or 100) diameter be that the spinning nozzle (there is strainer the front) of D (as 50,100,300 or 800 microns) is extruded by there being n from the solution of spinning pump.The liquid that sprays from each hole has obtained velocity of discharge Ve represented in the table 2.During from reactor to spinning nozzle, solution has reached required spinning temperature gradually, promptly near spinning nozzle temperature T e represented in the table 2.

Like this, composition has been transformed into the liquid extrudate of fibers form, and it comprises n hydrofluidic.

Following step comprises that the liquid extrudate that will obtain by this way is by cooling quenching fast, up to obtaining gel.This step is called " gelling step ", be that the liquid extrudate is finished by the zone in " gelling zone ", gelling has heat-eliminating medium in the zone, be referred to as " pectisation medium (medium of gelation) " or " gelling medium (gelling medium) ", medium temperature maintains and significantly is lower than T fTemperature (as low 50 ℃ at least).

Spinning nozzle is set in place in top, gelling zone, and it is regional apart from gelling to be that several mm are to several cm (about preferred 10mm).Spinning is to finish by the technology of using a kind of being referred to as " non coagulant stream layer (with non-coagulant fluid layer) " (dried squirting (dry jet wet)), wherein the liquid extrudate from the spinning nozzle ejection passed through a non coagulant stream layer, for example a gas cloud before entering the gelling zone.

The gelling medium is contained in the gelling district, its temperature T bType according to required fiber changes, but all is starkly lower than T fThis temperature T bPreferably be lower than room temperature, more preferably less than-40 ℃.The gelling zone can comprise a liquid bath, can be miscible or immiscible with solvent system as this liquid.For example, liquid bath can be water-bath, or the bath with the water master, and an organic solvent is bathed or the bath based on organic solvent.For example, these solvents are alcohols, as methyl alcohol or ethanol, alkanes, and as heptane, octane or nonane, ketone as acetone or methylethylketone, can use separately or with form of mixtures.

Gelling medium preferably a kind of and solvent system unmixing or accurate immiscible liquid, for example medium can be an alkanes.

The inventive method is used for obtaining fiber or film by description like this, although not too practical,, the refrigerative gaseous media can be used for forming the gelling medium.

In this gelling zone, can obtain cellulose derivative fibres by hot quenching to spinning component, it is the gel form of normally transparent, elastic thermal reversibility.

The characteristic of the gel phase of this composition is the restoring force that can demonstrate flexibility when it is subjected to the less pulling force of amplitude.Gel phase has a swollen three dimensional polymeric network in its solvent system, is similar to the gel phase of other the elastic thermal reversibility in the known polymer, as polyvinyl alcohol or polyethylene gel.

Because the fiber form of gel form only is the result of hot quench operation in the gelling zone, it can be finished under the situation that does not have mass transfer between liquid extrudate and the gelling medium, particularly not to the extraction of the solvent system of composition or significantly do not extract.For this purpose, it is very effective selecting a kind of and solvent system unmixing or accurate immiscible gelling medium composition.

In general, the inventive method is preferably carried out under such gelling condition, promptly prevents or make the mass transfer minimum between liquid extrudate and the gelling medium.

Thisly comprise that forming step by the agglomerative fiber is different from all known cellulosic fibres formation steps by spinning natch, for example be different from described in above-mentioned WO-A-85/05115 and the WO-A-94/17136.In fact, known step comprises a congealing step on traditional way, and its principle promptly can cause a large amount of extractions of solvent from fiber in contrast during fiber forms.

Leave the gelling zone, the fiber of the gel form of Xing Chenging is batched on first drive unit that for example has roller by this way, and its coiling speed (space rate of fiber) is defined as V Al, preferably approach V e, but this is optional.Fiber is by a series of washing device then, and these devices are based on organic solvent, for example, and as the alcohols of methyl alcohol, or based on water, with extraction from fiber and remove solvent in the original composition.

Leave washing step, fiber is batched on second drive unit of roller for example, coiling speed V A2Can equal or be not equal to V A1Work as V A1And V A2When unequal, stretching (if the V of fiber can take place between two drive units A2＞V A1) or loose (if the V of fiber A2＜V A1).

It is nonrestrictive using two drive units, and the inventive method can only be used a drive unit or use drive unit more than two.Particularly, can make the fiber of gel form between gelling zone and washing zone, stand loose or stretching by using extra drive unit.

The temperature of washing bath generally is higher than the temperature of gelling medium, but this neither be essential, and before regenerative operation, fiber can be dried and also can not be dried.4, cellulosic regeneration

In regeneration step, the cellulose formate fiber floods several seconds in regeneration is bathed, and regeneration is bathed for example can be at room temperature.Alkaline body lotion is arranged in this bath, for example contain the sodium hydroxide solution of 1-5wt% sodium hydroxide.Then with this mode regenerated fiber wash and dry.

In these different production stages (particularly spinning and regeneration), fiber can stand stretched operation, comprises bearing and being subjected to stretched operation, and it is reflected on the total drawing ratio of representing with FEF in the table 2.

Total drawing ratio is to measure substitution value, the operating parameters of process and the feature calculation of composition with known method from fiber number value, the regeneration back of fiber to come out.For example, when behind second drive unit, particularly in regenerative process do not have obviously to stretch or loose situation under, the FEF value of Que Dinging is very near V in this way A2/ V A1Ratio.

5, embodiment:

The embodiment of the present composition concentrates in the table 1.

Comprise that the test for preparing regenerated cellulose fibre is by top the 3rd, 4 section described technology, begins to carry out with the composition in the table 1.The characteristic procedure parameter of fiber is listed in table 2.The character of the fiber that is obtained is listed in table 3.

All these tests are all undertaken by the present invention.

Abbreviation, symbol and unit used in table 1-3 are as follows: in table 1: DMSO: dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO); The NMP:N-methyl-2-pyrrolidone; EG: ethylene glycol; DP: the cellulosic polymerization degree in the initial manthanoate; DS: the substitution value (%) of the plain manthanoate of original fibers; C: the concentration of cellulose formate (%) in the composition; DS c: the substitution value of cellulose formate (%) in the composition; T f: the melting temperature of gel form composition; Ar g: the elongation at break of gel form composition (%); σ g: the rupture stress of gel form composition (MPa); In table 2, n: the hole count of spinning nozzle; D: the diameter of each orifice (μ m); T e: the temperature of spinning nozzle (℃); V e: from the speed (meter/minute) of spinning nozzle discharge; T b: the temperature in gelling district (℃); V A1: first coiling speed (rice/minute); V A2: second coiling speed (rice/minute); C NaOH: the concentration (wt%) of NaOH during regeneration is bathed; t Reg: the residence time (second) during regeneration is bathed; FEF: total drawing ratio.In table 3: Ti: fiber number (tex); T: toughness (cN/tex); Ar: elongation at break (%); Mi: initial modulus (cN/tex); DS f: cellulosic formic acid ester group substitution value (%).Note about embodiment:

Under the working condition of composition, the polymerization degree of the cellulose formate in the composition is lower than the polymerization degree of the plain manthanoate of original fibers, and maximum difference is 10%, and it is very little.

Described as previous embodiment, in the production of cellulose formate, use formic acid and phosphoric acid can obtain substitution value, and cellulosic starting polymerization degree does not have excessive decline greater than 30% high cellulose formate.

Yet simultaneously in solution, (formylation in same solvent mixture and dissolving) possibility of forming derivative makes and can obtain uniform distribution between the manthanoate group of the pars amorpha of cellulose formate and crystallizing field promptly in position.

The method of its acquisition cellulose formate of base is possible, and these methods are preferably carried out in solution, to obtain the uniform distribution of this manthanoate group.

Just as shown in table 1, the substitution value of cellulose formate may be lower than in the initial manthanoate in the composition, promptly produces the substitution value in the composition manthanoate before.Owing to this reason, the value of the DSc that working condition of the present invention preferably obtains in these compositions equals 25% at least.

By with the present composition, as the composition among embodiment A, E, F, G, H, I and the J, the heat reversible gel that hot quenching obtains is elastic, bent type gel drawing force among the figure---extension curve is corresponding to embodiment A (curve C 1), E (curve C 2) and G (curve C 3), wherein transverse axis is represented elongation (ε), unit is %, and the longitudinal axis is represented power (F), and unit is newton.

When they by above during the 3.3rd section indicated detection of part i, the fiber filament that obtains by the present invention is that periphery from long filament is actually the successive form to its center from cross section (perpendicular to the direction of long filament axle), and this point is similar to from the viewed form of the described fiber of WO-A-94/17136.This saying that " is actually the successive form from periphery to its center of long filament " is interpreted as this long filament to be had in the good side direction poly-, particularly do not contain lamellar morphologies just like the anisotropy spinning component described in the WO-A-85/05115, the characteristics of this lamellar morphologies are that a series of a plurality of concentric layer around the long filament axle is arranged, and these layers are trapped among the inside mutually and are bound up by relative more weak cohesive action.

Fiber of the present invention will be through the water fibrillation test described in the 3.4th section of the part i.For relatively, the fiber of above-mentioned WO-A-85/05115 and WO-A-94/17136 is also tested.The fiber of pressing first patent application WO-A-85/05115 shows tangible fibrillation corresponding to described test.Compare with it, the latter promptly shows the antigen fibrillation ability of obvious raising by the fiber of second patent application WO-A-94/17136.Yet, there is a certain amount of microfilament on the surface of the fiber of being tested, this point shows that its fibrillation effect is can not be uncared-for.

Fiber only of the present invention shows almost constant filament surface situation after off-test.Particularly, do not measure the existence of microfilament on the surface of long filament.Therefore, scale (the fibrillation scale is 0-6) according to the fibrillation described in people's such as above-mentioned Marini the document (referring to the 3.4th section of part i), the fibrillation scale is zero (no fibrillation) in all cases, or less than 1, equal 1 scale and represent very slight fibrillation, for example, shown in Figure 5 in the document as people such as above-mentioned Marini.

In this sense, conclusion is that the long filament of fiber of the present invention can fibrillation or substantially can fibrillation.

Therefore, and itself be that the cellulosic fibre of describing among WO--A-85/05115 and WO-A-94/17136 from cellulose formate obtains is compared, fiber of the present invention has the antigen fibrillation ability of having improved greatly.

Know, antigen fibrillation ability is the character of seeking especially in the cellulose spinning fiber art, particularly in the various arrangement steps of the fabric of fiber or these fiber production (referring to as MelliandTextilberichte, 10/93,945-956 page or leaf) especially like this.

In a word, because the new very beat all feature of the present composition that is to say that the characteristic of elastic hot reversible gel no longer needs the aggegation step to come to obtain cellulosic fibre by spinning.This aggegation step is replaced by gelling step, and gelling step can carry out under the extraction that maybe can not notice solvent system generation extraction.Can obtain cellulosic fibre by gel spinning, these fibers transversely almost are the successive forms and are made up of good lateral cohesive long filament by having.And when they stood water fibrillation described above experiment, these long filaments can fibrillation or substantially can fibrillation.

Another advantage of the present invention is this gelling step can be adjusted the cross sections of fiber filament of the present invention in very wide scope a shape, this shape be selected spinning condition (ben be gelation temperature, gelling medium character, spinning nozzle extrude shape capillaceous) function.Therefore, can obtain to have very well-regulated cross sections and have clear and long filament linear accurately profile (as good circularity), or in contrast, obtain the long filament that cross section has surging profile (as thin knuckle-tooth shape profile).Particularly this adjustment can make fiber or the visual appearance of the fabric made by these fibers is improved.

Long filament of the present invention, particularly monofilament can have any section, for example circular or oval-shaped cross section.If cross section is not circular, then term " diameter " is meant the minimum size of this cross section.

Composition of the present invention preferably has the feature of one of following feature at least: ---The concentration of cellulose formate equals 4wt% at least; ---Mierocrystalline cellulose is equaled 25% at least by the substitution value that the formic acid ester group replaces; ---The cellulosic polymerization degree equals 200 at least in this manthanoate;

The feature that composition of the present invention has one of following feature at least is favourable: ---The concentration of cellulose formate equals 8wt% at least; ---Mierocrystalline cellulose is equaled 30% at least by the substitution value that the formic acid ester group replaces; ---The cellulosic polymerization degree equals 500 at least in this manthanoate; ---The relative quantity of component in this solvent system (II) equals 15wt% at least, preferably equals 20% at least.

The melting temperature of gel, Tf is preferably greater than 50 ℃.

Especially, the inventive method has following advantage: ---Comparing with viscose glue or rayon method, is free of contamination under its working conditions; ---Particularly by changing the cellulosic polymerization degree, the concentration of cellulose formate in the spinning component, and stretching factor in each treatment step of fiber, this method can be produced the fiber that its fiber number and mechanical property (toughness, initial modulus, elongation at break) in very large range change.In this manner, for example can obtain the high fiber number monofilament that its mechanical property is compared with the plain multifilament of known fiber; ---Owing to can use spinning solution, so it is economical than concentration higher in known viscose fiber or the rayon fibers production technique.

Fiber of the present invention preferably has the feature of one of following at least feature: ---Its toughness equals 20cN/tex at least; ---Its elongation at break equals 10% at least, preferably equals 15% at least.

The diameter of monfil of the present invention preferably equals 100 microns at least, and its fiber number equals 11.5tex at least.

The present invention is not limited only to above-mentioned specific embodiments certainly.

Therefore, composition of the present invention can be used for producing film, for example comprises the technology annotated on the drum cooler by use or comprises flowing out from spinning nozzle by use and enter an extruding technology that contains non-agglutinant fluid space and realize.

Because its new character beyond expectation, the present composition can finally adopt multiple possible liquid form, then, and after hot quenching, can change the intermediate of making by the cellulose formate gel into, the invention still further relates to such goods with given shape.These intermediates can obtain the end article made by regenerated cellulose by follow-up regeneration.

Except that extruding operation, by the inventive method, the first step of the transformation of composition can be an operation that comprises molding, casting, extruding, spraying, or more generally, the any meticulous and special forming operation that can comprise fluid composition, these all are to carry out before the gelling step of hot quenching.

Therefore, utilize method of the present invention, composition of the present invention can be produced the goods of being made by regenerated cellulose except that various types except that fiber or film, for example particle of sphere or torispherical or particulate.

In addition, before manthanoate dissolving, among or afterwards, can be in cellulose formate or solvent system arbitrarily interpolation do not change the different components of essence of the present invention.If there are these components to exist, its ratio is less, in the composition these components and preferably less than 10wt%, especially preferably less than 5wt%.

As an example, these extra components can be salt, as the fontanelle compound of basic metal or alkaline-earth metal, softening agent, can be with Mierocrystalline cellulose dissolved polymers, tensio-active agent, variously can make the conversion of the present composition and additive or the filler that processing is improved, various additives or filler that the performance of resulting product (as fiber or film) is improved, these performances comprise its mechanical property, durability or its adhesion property to rubber matrix.

Furtherly, term " cellulose formate " has comprised such a case, and promptly cellulosic alcohol groups is replaced by other group outside the formic acid ester group, for the latter's example ester group is arranged, ethoxycarbonyl particularly, Mierocrystalline cellulose by the substitution value of other group preferably less than 10%.

section.content: A composition comprising cellulose formate and a solvent system at least equal to TfAt a temperature substantially below TfAt a temperature of , the composition is an elastic, thermoreversible gel. A method of making regenerated cellulose articles by converting such compositions. Gel spinning to obtain a fiber or film. In particular regenerated cellulose fibres having good anti-fibrillation properties, which may be monofilament fibres. These fibers or films can be applied on fabrics or used industrially, for example, for reinforcing other articles, in particular tires.

The composition that contains cellulose formateThe present invention relates to obtain the composition of regenerated fibre cellulose product, particularly fiber or film, also relate to the method and the cellulosic fibre itself that obtain these goods.

Wet production viscose glue and rayon (rayon) fiber is known for a long time, in the method the shaping of fiber in coagulating bath (coagutation bath) be by finish by the dehydration of electrolyte solution and aggegation that solvent extraction causes (referring to as " Cellulose Chemistry andist Applications ", Ed.T.P.Nevell and S.H.Zeronian, Ellis Horwood Limited, 1985, the 18th chapter; And " Physics and Chemistry of Cellulose Fibers ", P.H.Hermans, Elsevier, 1949, third part).This method has been used the step of a series of complexity, is characterized in fairly obvious aspect pollution.

Proposed variously with the method that to remedy this pollution defective be purpose, these are summarized below.

The method that has proposed is: for example described in US-A-4416698, US-A-4734239 and DD298653, Mierocrystalline cellulose directly is dissolved in tertiary amine N-oxide compound, particularly in the N-methylmorpholine N-oxide compound.The character of these solvents is easy decomposition, and formation can set off an explosion and cause the superoxide of cellulose degradation.And the fiber that is obtained by this method shows tangible fibrillation trend.

Know that cellulosic fibre can be by preparing cellulose dissolution in the mixture of N,N-dimethylacetamide (DMAC) and LiCl, the same as described in US-A-4302252 and the EP-A-178293.But this method needs activated cellulose in advance.

JP-A-60/199912 and JP-A-60/209006 have described the method for using the cellulose solution producd fibers in organic solvent, and described organic solvent contains the halo tetraalkyl ammonium compound.This method does not allow dissolved cellulose concentration to surpass 6%.

WO-A-85/05115 and patent families EP-B-179822 thereof and US-A-4839113 have described the method by the anisotropic solution production of cellulose manthanoate fiber of the cellulose formate (cellulose formate) in formic acid and 99% crystalline phosphoric acid, and these fibers can be regenerated.The method of this acquisition fiber is free of contamination, and so the characteristics of the regenerated cellulose fibre that obtains are the mechanical property height; Initial modulus and toughness (tenacity) height particularly.Yet the fiber that obtains in this way has very orderly structure and special form, and it has reflected the anisotropy characteristics of starting soln, and this makes these fibers be not suitable for being used for fabric.

WO-A-94/17136 has described a kind of regenerated cellulose fibre, and it is to obtain by the isotropic aqueous solution of cellulose formiate in appropriate solvent.Method described in this patent application is free of contamination, and can also obtain " specialty " fiber (rayon type) because it can obtain to be referred to as outside " weaving " fiber (viscose glue type), so be very flexible.Compare with the fiber of describing among the WO-A-85/05115, the characteristics of the fiber that is obtained particularly its structure are comparatively unordered, show bigger continuity from form in reverse direction.Yet its elongation at break value is medium under most situation, in some application, especially has trouble on textile applications.

The specific purposes of invention are by proposing a kind of composition that comprises derivatived cellulose, the described composition of a kind of usefulness obtains the regenerated fibre cellulose product, especially the method for fiber or film, and a kind of regenerated cellulose fibre remedies above-mentioned shortcoming or limits these shortcomings.

A kind of by composition of the present invention, it is characterized in that:

A) it contains cellulose formate and the system that is referred to as " solvent system " that can dissolve described manthanoate;

B)---equaling T at least fTemperature under said composition be solution;

---be starkly lower than T fTemperature under said composition be the elasticity heat reversible gel.

Prepare the method for regenerated fibre cellulose product by the present invention, it is characterized in that:

A) be under the temperature of solution in said composition, the composition that limits above changed into liquid target compound with desired article shape;

B) make described liquid target compound through the quenching of being heated by the quick cooling of described solution in the gelling medium, obtain the elasticity heat reversible gel, quench temperature is starkly lower than T f

C) goods of the described gel form of washing are removed whole or most of solvent systems;

D) Mierocrystalline cellulose of raw product again;

C) washing and dry so regenerated goods.

Be used for obtaining fiber or film especially by method of the present invention, it is by changing said composition, and especially extruding said composition in a) in above-mentioned steps becomes that liquid target compound with fiber or film shape finishes.

At least the regenerated cellulose fibre of being made up of a threads (filament) of the present invention is characterised in that it has following character:

A) cellulosic manthanoate group substitution value is used DS fExpression is expressed with %, satisfies following relation: 0＜DS f＜5;

B) from the form of the cross section of long filament, be successive basically to the center from periphery;

C) this long filament fibrillation not, or fibrillation hardly;

D) initial modulus of this fiber equals 500cN/tex at least, and elongation at break equals 5% at least, and its toughness equals 15cN/tex at least.

Especially, fiber of the present invention is a monfil, and its diameter is greater than 40 μ m, and its fiber number is greater than 2.0tex.

The invention still further relates to the regenerated fibre cellulose product that obtains by the inventive method, especially fiber and film, and the assembly that contains at least one fiber of the present invention and/or thin film, described assembly can be cable (cables), monofilament cable (monofilament cable) for example, ply yarn, or multifilament fiber, wherein said goods or assembly can be as hydridization or compound, that is to say to comprise of different naturely, and also can be not according to parts of the present invention.

Goods of the present invention and/or assembly can be used on the packing material in (as food packaging article), the textile industry especially, also can be used as industrial strongthener, as be used for strengthening the goods of making by rubber or plastic material, particularly be with, pipe and tire, the present invention also relates to these enhanced goods.

This solvent system preferably by at least a for cellulose formate be non-proton transfer solvent component (I) and at least a be that the component (II) of non-solvent forms concerning cellulose formate, the amount of described non-solvent, the total amount of described non-solvent equals 10% of solvent system gross weight at least in other words, equals 40% of solvent system gross weight at most.

Advantageously:

---aprotonic solvent is selected from group (I), and it comprises alkyl sulfoxide, lactan, no cyclic amide, the ring type derivative of methyl substituted urea is arranged on nitrogen-atoms, and wherein said lactan and no cyclammonium can be that replace or unsubstituted;

---non-solvent component is selected from group (II), and it comprises water and alcohol.

The form of the fiber basis long filament of being studied can detect with the optics polarizing microscope, and this long filament is placed between the linear analyzer and polariscope of intersection, and the axle of this long filament is parallel to the plane on analyzer and polariscope surface.This long filament also can detect with electron microscope.

At first, in its original state, promptly complete state is observed fiber down, then, makes them stand a series of progressive wearing and tearing and continues to observe.This wearing and tearing are finished with simple mode, for example, do not have cutting action but have the either large or small degree of the object of appropriate size ground to wipe and the surface of file fiber with one, as pin or the scraper with a rubber or tweezers.

The morphological analysis of the single long filament that carries out like this provides the information of they side direction cohesions (cohesion), i.e. their cohesions (perpendicular to the axle of long filament) in the horizontal.

Here, fiber is studied under their residing drying regimes, and they only contain a spot of water, and these water have constituted its residual natural humidity.3.4, water fibrillation test

To the fibrillation Research on ability of fiber, perhaps in other words they can be undertaken by the test that is called " test of water fibrillation " the research of the endurance of fibrillation, and this is that the swollen primary filaments in water of these fibers is carried out.

As known to, fibrillation is interpreted as the interior poly-loss in a part of region surface of the long filament considered.Mainly be that the vertically interior poly-loss of (promptly along silk axially) is owing to comprise the wiping on surface and the mechanical stress of file and cause, and be combined in swelling action in the water when (as in this test) when mechanical stress, its meeting is obviously increase thereupon.

Fibrillation is to show by the thin fibril that the surface at long filament occurs more or less, and the apparent and shape of these thin fibrils resembles very thin hair or extremely thin silk ribbon or fur.These thin fibrils, the thickness (as diameter) of primitive fiber or extremely thin fur is significantly less than the thickness of long filament, they form on described long filament, its coefficient normally at least 10 or 20, for example, this thickness is less than 1 micron or 1/10th microns, and its length is limited, for example from tens to hundreds of micron.Know that the fibrillation of cellulosic fibre can change to a great extent, this depends on its character and manufacture method.Particularly, the test of water fibrillation can be used for setting up a kind of classification between these fibers.

The fibrillation test that is generally used for cellulosic textile fibre is described in the following reference, i.e. the Chemiefasern/Textilindustrie of I.Marini etc., 43./95.Jahrgang, November, PP.879-883.

8 primary filaments are cut into long 200mm, join in the bottle of 25ml with 4ml distilled water again, and temperature is a room temperature.Utilize Salvis type agitator bottle to be stirred 24 hours with the rotating speed of 200rpm.At room temperature dry then these long filaments, and observe under the magnification of 200-2000 with scanning electronic microscope, this multiple depend on the diameter (for example, to the diameter of the silk usefulness 200 greater than 40 μ m) of long filament.Long filament before the surface condition of the long filament of handling in this way and the fibrillation test compares.

Document as above-mentioned I.Marini is specified, based on total visual evaluator of the long filament tested, can carry out different interfibrous classification by means of the fibrillation scale that is made of from 0 to 6 fibrillation mark (or degree).The production of II, fiber

Cellulose formate is by above mentioned WO-A85/0115, for example with the crystalline phosphoric acid preparation of Mierocrystalline cellulose, formic acid and 99%.

Use following schedule of operation, for example: cellulose powder (its humidity and ambient air moisture equilibrium) is added in the mixing tank that adds chuck with Z-shaped arm.The mixture that adds 99% crystalline phosphoric acid and formic acid then.The ratio of three kinds of components is as follows, for example: 16% Mierocrystalline cellulose; 51% ortho-phosphoric acid; 33% formic acid (all being weight %)

All raw material mixed about 2 to 4 hours, and mixing temperature maintains 10-20 ℃.Under these conditions, polymerization degree decline 20-30%, the variation of formic acid ratio can cause the change of substitution value (DS), and under these conditions, the DS value of acquisition is 40%-50%.

The cellulose formiate solution that this mode obtains is extruded with extrusion screw rod from the mixing tank that a Z-shaped arm is arranged, with form quenching in cold water (as 10 ℃) of the bar-shaped liquid of the about 0.5mm of diameter.Obtained the cellulose formate rod by aggegation and neutralization washing in this manner, and it is dry in warm air.Certain this method only is to quote as the mode of embodiment.According to different extrusion conditions, can obtain the rod of higher fineness, or even obtain the rough wearing fiber of cellulose formate staple form.By also producing film on the roller that for example solution is expressed into rolling press.2, the production of spinning component

By cellulose formate composition of the present invention is to obtain by these exsiccant cellulose formate rods are dissolved in the solvent system of being studied.

For example, can use the operation of following form:

Rod is cut into the long section of about 10mm, and preparation at room temperature earlier forms the mixture of the component of solvent system.In the rod and the reactor under the solvent system adding room temperature that cut.This reactor comprises the container of a bivalve, agitator, vacuum pipeline and a nitrogen inlet.

Mixture is warming up to 110 ℃ progressively, also stirs lightly simultaneously in about one hour.In this first step, can comprise the degassing step under the parital vacuum.In second step, continue down the isothermal dissolving at 120 ℃, and stir about 2-3 hour simultaneously, up to obtaining limpid, even and not containing the solution of bubble.Described second step can carry out in inert atmosphere.Certainly, this method is also only quoted as an example.Pointed temperature and time can have very big change according to mixture and the desired composition studied.3, the spinning of composition

In the reactor of Miao Shuing, temperature is higher than T in front fThe composition of (as 120 ℃) is the solution form, promptly is fluidic, uniform liquid form.These solution are transported to the spinning unit and deliver to spinning pump by applying nitrogen pressure.To extrude orifice or kapillary (for example n equals 1,26 or 100) diameter be that the spinning nozzle (there is strainer the front) of D (as 50,100,300 or 800 microns) is extruded by there being n from the solution of spinning pump.The liquid that sprays from each hole has obtained velocity of discharge Ve represented in the table 2.During from reactor to spinning nozzle, solution has reached required spinning temperature gradually, promptly near spinning nozzle temperature T e represented in the table 2.

Like this, composition has been transformed into the liquid extrudate of fibers form, and it comprises n hydrofluidic.

Following step comprises that the liquid extrudate that will obtain by this way is by cooling quenching fast, up to obtaining gel.This step is called " gelling step ", be that the liquid extrudate is finished by the zone in " gelling zone ", gelling has heat-eliminating medium in the zone, be referred to as " pectisation medium (medium of gelation) " or " gelling medium (gelling medium) ", medium temperature maintains and significantly is lower than T fTemperature (as low 50 ℃ at least)

Spinning nozzle is set in place in top, gelling zone, and it is regional apart from gelling to be that several mm are to several cm (about preferred 10mm).Spinning is to finish by the technology of using a kind of being referred to as " non coagulant stream layer (with non-coagulant fluid layer) " (dried squirting (dry jet wet)), wherein the liquid extrudate from the spinning nozzle ejection passed through a non coagulant stream layer, for example a gas cloud before entering the gelling zone.

The gelling medium is contained in the gelling district, its temperature T bType according to required fiber changes, but all is starkly lower than T fThis temperature T bPreferably be lower than room temperature, more preferably less than-40 ℃.The gelling zone can comprise a liquid bath, can be miscible or immiscible with solvent system as this liquid.For example, liquid bath can be water-bath, or the bath with the water master, and an organic solvent is bathed or the bath based on organic solvent.For example, these solvents are alcohols, as methyl alcohol or ethanol, alkanes, and as heptane, octane or nonane, ketone as acetone or methylethylketone, can use separately or with form of mixtures.

Gelling medium preferably a kind of and solvent system unmixing or accurate immiscible liquid, for example medium can be an alkanes.

The inventive method is used for obtaining fiber or film by description like this, although not too practical,, the refrigerative gaseous media can be used for forming the gelling medium.

In this gelling zone, can obtain cellulose derivative fibres by hot quenching to spinning component, it is the gel form of normally transparent, elastic thermal reversibility.

The characteristic of the gel phase of this composition is the restoring force that can demonstrate flexibility when it is subjected to the less pulling force of amplitude.Gel phase has a swollen three dimensional polymeric network in its solvent system, is similar to the gel phase of other the elastic thermal reversibility in the known polymer, as polyvinyl alcohol or polyethylene gel.

Because the fiber form of gel form only is the result of hot quench operation in the gelling zone, it can be finished under the situation that does not have mass transfer between liquid extrudate and the gelling medium, particularly not to the extraction of the solvent system of composition or significantly do not extract.For this purpose, it is very effective selecting a kind of and solvent system unmixing or accurate immiscible gelling medium composition.

In general, the inventive method is preferably carried out under such gelling condition, promptly prevents or make the mass transfer minimum between liquid extrudate and the gelling medium.

Thisly comprise that forming step by the agglomerative fiber is different from all known cellulosic fibres formation steps by spinning natch, for example be different from described in above-mentioned WO-A-85/05115 and the WO-A-94/17136.In fact, known step comprises a congealing step on traditional way, and its principle promptly can cause a large amount of extractions of solvent from fiber in contrast during fiber forms.

When they by above during the 3.3rd section indicated detection of part i, the fiber filament that obtains by the present invention is that periphery from long filament is actually the successive form to its center from cross section (perpendicular to the direction of long filament axle), and this point is similar to from the viewed form of the described fiber of WO-A-94/17136.This saying that " is actually the successive form from periphery to its center of long filament " is interpreted as this long filament to be had in the good side direction poly-, particularly do not contain lamellar morphologies just like the anisotropy spinning component described in the WO-A-85/05115, the characteristics of this lamellar morphologies are that a series of a plurality of concentric layer around the long filament axle is arranged, and these layers are trapped among the inside mutually and are bound up by relative more weak cohesive action.

Fiber of the present invention will be through the water fibrillation test described in the 3.4th section of the part i.For relatively, the fiber of above-mentioned WO-A-85/05115 and WO-A-94/17136 is also tested.The fiber of pressing first patent application WO-A-85/05115 shows tangible fibrillation corresponding to described test.Compare with it, the latter promptly shows the antigen fibrillation ability of obvious raising by the fiber of second patent application WO-A-94/17136.Yet, there is a certain amount of microfilament on the surface of the fiber of being tested, this point shows that its fibrillation effect is can not be uncared-for.

Fiber only of the present invention shows almost constant filament surface situation after off-test.Particularly, do not measure the existence of microfilament on the surface of long filament.Therefore, scale (the fibrillation scale is 0-6) according to the fibrillation described in people's such as above-mentioned Marini the document (referring to the 3.4th section of part i), the fibrillation scale is zero (no fibrillation) in all cases, or less than 1, equal 1 scale and represent very slight fibrillation, for example, shown in Figure 5 in the document as people such as above-mentioned Marini.

In this sense, conclusion is that the long filament of fiber of the present invention can fibrillation or substantially can fibrillation.

Therefore, and itself be that the cellulosic fibre of describing among WO-A-85/05115 and WO-A-94/17136 from cellulose formate obtains is compared, fiber of the present invention has the antigen fibrillation ability of having improved greatly.

Know, antigen fibrillation ability is the character of seeking especially in the cellulose spinning fiber art, particularly in the various arrangement steps of the fabric of fiber or these fiber production (referring to as MelliandTextilberichte, 10/93,945-956 page or leaf) especially like this.

In a word, because the new very beat all feature of the present composition that is to say that the characteristic of elastic hot reversible gel no longer needs the aggegation step to come to obtain cellulosic fibre by spinning.This aggegation step is replaced by gelling step, and gelling step can carry out under the extraction that maybe can not notice solvent system generation extraction.Can obtain cellulosic fibre by gel spinning, these fibers transversely almost are the successive forms and are made up of good lateral cohesive long filament by having.And when they stood water fibrillation described above experiment, these long filaments can fibrillation or substantially can fibrillation.

Another advantage of the present invention is this gelling step can be adjusted the cross sections of fiber filament of the present invention in very wide scope a shape, this shape be selected spinning condition (ben be gelation temperature, gelling medium character, spinning nozzle extrude shape capillaceous) function.Therefore, can obtain to have very well-regulated cross sections and have clear and long filament linear accurately profile (as good circularity), or in contrast, obtain the long filament that cross section has surging profile (as thin knuckle-tooth shape profile).Particularly this adjustment can make fiber or the visual appearance of the fabric made by these fibers is improved.

Long filament of the present invention, particularly monofilament can have any section, for example circular or oval-shaped cross section.If cross section is not circular, then term " diameter " is meant the minimum size of this cross section.

Composition of the present invention preferably has the feature of one of following feature at least:---the concentration of cellulose formate equals 4wt% at least;---Mierocrystalline cellulose is equaled 25% at least by the substitution value that the formic acid ester group replaces;---the cellulosic polymerization degree equals 200 at least in this manthanoate;

The feature that composition of the present invention has one of following feature at least is favourable:---the concentration of cellulose formate equals 8wt% at least;---Mierocrystalline cellulose is equaled 30% at least by the substitution value that the formic acid ester group replaces;---the cellulosic polymerization degree equals 500 at least in this manthanoate;---the relative quantity of component in this solvent system (II) equals 15wt% at least, preferably equals 20% at least.

The melting temperature of gel, T fBe preferably greater than 50 ℃.

Especially, the inventive method has following advantage:---comparing with viscose glue or rayon method, is free of contamination under its working conditions;---particularly by changing the cellulosic polymerization degree, the concentration of cellulose formate in the spinning component, and stretching factor in each treatment step of fiber, this method can be produced the fiber that its fiber number and mechanical property (toughness, initial modulus, elongation at break) in very large range change.In this manner, for example can obtain the high fiber number monofilament that its mechanical property is compared with the plain multifilament of known fiber;---owing to the spinning solution that can use, so it is economical than concentration higher in known viscose fiber or the rayon fibers production technique.

Fiber of the present invention preferably has the feature of one of following at least feature:---its toughness equals 20cN/tex at least;---its elongation at break equals 10% at least, preferably equals 15% at least.

The diameter of monfil of the present invention preferably equals 100 microns at least, and its fiber number equals 11.5tex at least.

The present invention is not limited only to above-mentioned specific embodiments certainly.

Therefore, composition of the present invention can be used for producing film, for example comprises the technology annotated on the drum cooler by use or comprises flowing out from spinning nozzle by use and enter an extruding technology that contains non-agglutinant fluid space and realize.

Because its new character beyond expectation, the present composition can finally adopt multiple possible liquid form, then, and after hot quenching, can change the intermediate of making by the cellulose formate gel into, the invention still further relates to such goods with given shape.These intermediates can obtain the end article made by regenerated cellulose by follow-up regeneration.

Except that extruding operation, by the inventive method, the first step of the transformation of composition can be an operation that comprises molding, casting, extruding, spraying, or more generally, the any meticulous and special forming operation that can comprise fluid composition, these all are to carry out before the gelling step of hot quenching.

Therefore, utilize method of the present invention, composition of the present invention can be produced the goods of being made by regenerated cellulose except that various types except that fiber or film, for example particle of sphere or torispherical or particulate.

In addition, before manthanoate dissolving, among or afterwards, can be in cellulose formate or solvent system arbitrarily interpolation do not change the different components of essence of the present invention.If there are these components to exist, its ratio is less, in the composition these components and preferably less than 10wt%, especially preferably less than 5wt%.

As an example, these extra components can be salt, as the fontanelle compound of basic metal or alkaline-earth metal, softening agent, can be with Mierocrystalline cellulose dissolved polymers, tensio-active agent, variously can make the conversion of the present composition and additive or the filler that processing is improved, various additives or filler that the performance of resulting product (as fiber or film) is improved, these performances comprise its mechanical property, durability or its adhesion property to rubber matrix.

Furtherly, term " cellulose formate " has comprised such a case, and promptly cellulosic alcohol groups is replaced by other group outside the formic acid ester group, for the latter's example ester group is arranged, ethoxycarbonyl particularly, Mierocrystalline cellulose by the substitution value of other group preferably less than 10%.

Polyimide derived from a dianhydride and diamine having hydroxyl or carboxyl groups, which are modified with a diepoxide or unsaturated group-containing epoxide; curable; heat resistance, dielectric, film-forming
