section.content: The invention discloses a kind of environment-friendly type antibiotic fire-retardant TPE carpet back-adhesive powder, it is prepared raw material and comprises: MAH g SEBS, MAH g PP, polyquaternary ammonium salt chitosan super branched polyurethane complex and sulfonated polyimide modified graphene oxide.The invention also discloses the preparation method of described environment-friendly type antibiotic fire-retardant TPE carpet back-adhesive powder.
本发明公开了种环保型抗菌阻燃TPE地毯背胶粉料，其制备原料包含：MAH‑g‑SEBS、MAH‑g‑PP、聚季铵盐‑壳聚糖‑超支化聚氨酯复合物以及磺化聚酰亚胺改性氧化石墨烯。本发明还公开了所述环保型抗菌阻燃TPE地毯背胶粉料的制备方法。

Environment-friendly type antibiotic fire-retardant TPE carpet back-adhesive powder and preparation method thereofTechnical field

The invention belongs to carpet back-adhesive powder field, more particularly it relates to an environment-friendly type antibiotic TPE ground blanket back Rubber powder material and preparation method thereof.

Background technology

Existing carpet back-adhesive typically uses lotion applicator, then obtains after heating, drying.It is multiple owing to emulsion containing Auxiliary chemicals, such as wetting agent, dispersant, accelerator, plasticizer, thickening agent, antisettling agent, levelling agent, emulsifying organosilicon toluene Solution, foaming agent (or defoamer) etc., thus inevitably residual fraction monomer, produce pungent abnormal flavour, even cause Cancer.Additionally, the water content of emulsion is high, substantial amounts of water resource, inadequate environmental protection during production, can be wasted.Meanwhile, due to carpet It is widely used in life staying idle at home, it is highly desirable to it has certain antibacterial, anti-impact and fire resistance, both can provide comfortable Environment, can ensure safety again.

Hence it is highly desirable to by formula and the improvement of production technology, prepare asepsis environment-protecting, and have concurrently high antibacterial, high The carpet back-adhesive powder of anti-impact and high flame resistance.

Summary of the invention

In order to solve the problems referred to above, one aspect of the present invention provides a kind of environment-friendly type antibiotic fire-retardant TPE carpet back-adhesive powder Expecting, it is prepared raw material and comprises:

The MAH-g-SEBS of 100 weight portions；

The MAH-g-PP of 40～50 weight portions；

Polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane the complex of 5～20 weight portions；With

The sulfonated polyimide modified graphene oxide of 5～15 weight portions；

Wherein, described polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex is by first gathering with polyquaternary ammonium salt modification shell Sugar, then with the modification of chitosan obtained, super branched polyurethane is modified process and obtains.

In one embodiment, in described polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex, described polyquaternary amine Salt is by dibenzyl bromide and 1,4-lupetazin 1:(0.8 in molar ratio～0.99) prepare.

In one embodiment, described sulfonated polyimide modified graphene oxide is silane coupled by comprising epoxy type The raw material of agent, amino-terminated sulfonated polyimide prepolymer and graphene oxide prepares.

In one embodiment, described environment-friendly type antibiotic fire-retardant TPE carpet back-adhesive powder, it is prepared raw material and also comprises 10 ～20 copolymers of alkyl acrylate and cyclopentadiene organosilicon of weight portion, the alkyl in wherein said alkyl acrylate There is 1 ~ 12 carbon atom.

Another aspect of the present invention provides a kind of side preparing described environment-friendly type antibiotic fire-retardant TPE carpet back-adhesive powder Method, comprises the following steps:

A. by selected raw material by weight ratio, stirred by blender at normal temperatures；

B. the material stirred is joined double screw extruder and is heated to 180 DEG C～220 DEG C extrusions；

C. the fluid being extruded enters cooling roll and is pressed into sheet stock；

D. size-reduced for sheet stock machine is pulverized, cross grit number 200 mesh to nanoscale.

It is more readily understood the above-mentioned of the application and other features, aspect and advantage with reference to described further below.

Detailed description of the invention

Participate in the election of the detailed description being preferable to carry out method of the invention below and the embodiment that includes can be more easily understood these public affairs Open content.Can mention a large amount of term in description below and claims, these terms are defined as following meanings.

Singulative includes that plural number discusses object, unless the context clearly dictates otherwise.

" optional " or " optionally " refers to that the item described thereafter or event may or may not occur, and this is retouched State and include situation that event occurs and the situation that event does not occurs.

Approximation term in specification and claims is used for modifying quantity, represents that the present invention is not limited to this concrete Quantity, also includes close to this quantity acceptable without causing the part of the correction of the change of relevant basic function.Phase Answer, modify a numerical value with " about ", " about " etc., mean and the invention is not restricted to this exact numerical.In some example, approximation Term likely corresponds to measure the precision of the instrument of numerical value.In present specification and claims, scope limits permissible Combination and/or exchange, these scopes include all subranges contained therebetween if not stated otherwise.

One aspect of the present invention provides one to provide a kind of environment-friendly type antibiotic fire-retardant TPE carpet back-adhesive powder, and it is prepared Raw material comprises:

The MAH-g-SEBS of 100 weight portions；

The MAH-g-PP of 40～50 weight portions；

Polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane the complex of 5～20 weight portions；With

The sulfonated polyimide modified graphene oxide of 5～15 weight portions；

Wherein, described polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex is by first gathering with polyquaternary ammonium salt modification shell Sugar, then with the modification of chitosan obtained, super branched polyurethane is modified process and obtains.

Term " SEBS " used herein refers to polystyrene as end segment, is hydrogenated with the second obtained with polybutadiene Alkene-butylene copolymer is the linear three embedding copolymers of middle spring block.Maleic anhydride modified SEBS(MAH-g-in the application SEBS) refer to use maleic anhydride that SEBS is carried out graft modification, solution graft copolymerization and two kinds of method systems of fusion-grafting can be used Standby, wherein, when solution grafting carries out SEBS grafting MAH, the graft reaction time is long, and grafting efficiency is low, and needing to consume has in a large number Poison, flammable solvent, production cost is high, big to human injury, pollutes environment, takes up an area big, it is difficult to realize continuous operation.Therefore, Preferably employ melt grafting.

It is not particularly limited as the MAH-g-SEBS used in the present invention, can be commercially available or experiment synthesizes, its In, the percent grafting of MAH can be 1%～3%；Preferably, in described MAH-g-SEBS, the percent grafting of MAH is 2%.

Maleic anhydride modified PP(MAH-g-PP as using in the present invention) be not particularly limited, can be commercially available or Experiment synthesis, wherein, the percent grafting of MAH can be 1%～3%；Preferably, the percent grafting of MAH is 2%.

Term " polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex " used herein refers to first use polyquaternary amine Salt modification of chitosan, then with the modification of chitosan obtained, super branched polyurethane is modified process and obtains.

In one embodiment, in described polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex, described polyquaternary amine Salt is by dibenzyl bromide and 1,4-lupetazin 1:(0.8 in molar ratio～0.99) prepare；Preferably, described polyquaternary amine Salt is prepared with 1,4-lupetazin 1:0.9 in molar ratio by dibenzyl bromide.

The concrete preparation method of described polyquaternary ammonium salt can be:

In 100 ml three-necked bottles, add dibenzyl bromide 0.1 mol, Isosorbide-5-Nitrae-lupetazin 0.08～0.099 mol And solvent DMF 50ml, after reacting 10～24 hours at 40～60 DEG C, decompression distillation is removed solvent and is obtained Polyquaternary ammonium salt.

Super branched polyurethane for the application is prepared by employing A2+B3 method, and obtains isocyanate-terminated polymerization Thing, method particularly includes:

1) diisocyanate and trihydroxylic alcohol are dissolved separately in polar solvent, respectively obtain diisocyanate solution and three Unit's alcoholic solution, controlling its mass concentration is 5～30%；Wherein, diisocyanate is isophorone diisocyanate, 4 ' 4-hexichol Dicyclohexylmethane diisocyanate, hexamethylene diisocyanate or 2,4 toluene di-isocyanate(TDI)s；Described trihydroxylic alcohol be glycerol, Trimethylolpropane or polyether-tribasic alcohol；

2) 30～100 DEG C, under protective atmosphere, limit is stirred, and is added to by diisocyanate solution in trihydroxylic alcohol solution, wherein The mol ratio of the isocyanate group of diisocyanate and the hydroxyl of trihydroxylic alcohol is 9:8～3:1；After diisocyanate has added, instead Answer architecture heat preservation reaction 10～30h；Then in reaction system, add protective agent, at 30～100 DEG C, continue reaction 5～10h；

3) reaction terminate after, decompression distilling off solvent after, by gained material through oxolane dissolve, in methanol sedimentation and After filtration, by it the vacuum drying 10～24h of 50～140 DEG C, obtain the super branched polyurethane containing isocyanate group of purification；

Preferably, the mol ratio of the hydroxyl of the isocyanate group of described diisocyanate and trihydroxylic alcohol is 2:1.

In one embodiment, described diisocyanate solution, the solvent of trihydroxylic alcohol solution employing are that dimethyl is sub- Sulfone, DMAC N,N' dimethyl acetamide, N,N-dimethylformamide, N, in N-dimethyl pyrrolidone, oxolane or toluene Kind or several mixing.

In one embodiment, described protective agent is phenol, caprolactam, ethylene glycol or methyl ethyl ketoxime；Protect Protect addition is diisocyanate molal quantity the 1～60% of agent.

Polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex for the application can obtain especially by following methods:

A () prepares polyquaternary ammonium salt modification of chitosan:

In 100ml three-necked bottle, add chitosan 0.1 mol and polyquaternary ammonium salt 0.01～0.2 mol of above-mentioned synthesis, After stirring under room temperature；Weigh the sodium hydroxide of 0.01～0.3 mol and with after water dissolution, add said mixture, 30 ～after reacting 10～24 hours at 60 DEG C, after neutralizing with hydrobromic acid and using ethanol cyclic washing, sucking filtration is also dried to obtain polyquaternary ammonium salt Modification of chitosan.

B () prepares polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex:

In 100 ml three-necked bottles, add the polyquaternary ammonium salt modification of chitosan 0.1 gram of above-mentioned synthesis, super branched polyurethane After stirring under 0.2～2 gram and DMF 50ml, room temperature；React 10～24 hours at 30～60 DEG C After, settle in methanol and filter, obtaining polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex；

Preferably, described polyquaternary ammonium salt modification of chitosan is 1:5 with the weight ratio of super branched polyurethane.

On the one hand adding of polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex can pass through a large amount of of polyquaternary ammonium salt Concentrate, play good antibacterial effect, on the other hand, also can play certain micro-on the premise of not affecting processing characteristics Crosslinked action, improves intensity and the anti-wear performance of carpet back-adhesive powder, additionally, special hyperbranched spherical structure can also be protected The elasticity of card powder and the compatibility good with SEBS, be thus provided that the Advantageous Effects of the present invention.

It is to be noted that the type of quaternary ammonium salt has much relations with stability, the application uses benzyl bromide a-bromotoluene replace routine Aliphatic chain bromine, the stability of quaternary ammonium salt can be improved significantly, thus improve the stability of anti-microbial property.

Term " sulfonated polyimide " used herein is to be obtained by anhydride and sulfonated diamine polymerization as raw material Arrive, following formula (1) represent.

In formula, Ar1Represent the organic group of 4 valencys, Ar2Organic group for divalent.

Term " graphene oxide " used herein is powdered graphite product after chemical oxidation and stripping, oxidation Graphene is single atomic layer, can expand to some tens of pm at any time on lateral dimension, and therefore, its construct trans is general Chemistry and the typical size of material science.Graphene oxide can be considered the flexible material of a kind of non-traditional kenel, have polymer, Colloid, thin film, and amphiphilic characteristic.After oxidation processes, graphite oxide still keeps the layer structure of graphite, but Many epoxide functional groups are introduced on the Graphene monolithic of each layer.Graphene oxide is typically obtained through strong acid oxidation by graphite. Mainly there are three kinds of methods preparing graphite oxide: Brodie method, Staudenmaier method and Hummers method.Wherein Hummers method Preparation process ageing relatively preferably and also preparation process also compares safety, be the most the most frequently used one.It uses After potassium permanganate in concentrated sulphuric acid and the oxidized reaction of powdered graphite, obtain brown has derivative carboxylic acid group and flat at edge Being mainly phenolic hydroxyl group and the graphite flake of epoxide group on face, this graphene layers can be stirred vigorously stripping through ultrasonic or high shear From for graphene oxide, and in water, form stable, the single-layer graphene oxide suspension of sundown.Owing to conjugate network is subject to To serious functionalization, graphene oxide thin slice has the speciality of insulation.Partial reduction can be carried out through reduction treatment, obtain chemistry The graphene platelet modified.At present, prepare graphene oxide new method and emerged in an endless stream, be generally divided into top-down side Method and the big class of Bottom-up approach two.The former thinking is to split crystalline flake graphite etc. to prepare graphene oxide, with traditional three methods Improved method be representative, also include the method etc. splitting (breaking) CNT.The latter is the side with the synthesis of various carbon sources Method, concrete grammar is multifarious, of a great variety.

Sulfonated polyimide modified graphene oxide in the application refers to sulfonated polyimide prepolymer oxidation stone Ink alkene carries out graft modification process, including using the sulfonated polyimide prepolymer modified graphene oxide of one pack system or using it He coordinates modified graphene oxide with sulfonated polyimide prepolymer at component.

In one embodiment, described sulfonated polyimide modified graphene oxide is by comprising amino-terminated polyamides

The raw material of imines prepolymer, epoxy silane coupling agent and graphene oxide prepares；Preferably, described amino Capped polyimides prepolymer is 1:(0.8～0.98 by comprising mol ratio) sulfonated diamine and the raw material of dianhydride prepare.

Described sulfonated polyimide modified graphene oxide can use following synthetic method:

(1) preparation of epoxy silane modified polyimide prepolymer

Sulfonated diamine, appropriate metacresol and the triethylamine of 1 mole is added, at indifferent gas in the there-necked flask being completely dried The lower stirring of body protection, after sulfonated diamine is completely dissolved, adds the dianhydride of 0.8～0.98 mole and the catalysis of 2.0～4.0 moles Agent, after being stirred at room temperature about 30min, is heated to about 75～85 DEG C, reacts about 3.5～4.5h, then at about 175～185 DEG C, Reaction about 3.5～4.5h；After reaction terminates, it is down to room temperature, solution is poured in methanol, has Precipitation；Repeatedly wash with methanol After filtering after washing removal solvent, in vacuum drying oven, at about 50 DEG C, dry about 22～24h, obtain amino-terminated polyimides pre- Polymers；

Amino-terminated polyimide preformed polymer 10 parts, epoxy type silane coupler is added in the there-necked flask being completely dried 1～30 part and appropriate good solvent, under inert gas shielding after stir about 30min, be heated to about 75～85 DEG C and react about 2h After, it is down to room temperature, solution is poured in methanol, has Precipitation；After filtering after removing solvent with methanol cyclic washing, in vacuum Baking oven is dried at about 50 DEG C about 22～24h, obtains the polyimide preformed polymer that epoxy silane is modified；

(2) preparation of polyimide modified graphene oxide

The polyimide preformed polymer 10 parts of the epoxy silane modification that step (1) is prepared, and graphene oxide 10～50 Part adds in deionized water, adds appropriate bases regulation PH to 8～10, and after ultrasonic about 30min, at about 65～75 DEG C, stirring reaction is about After 80～100min, adding appropriate hydrochloric acid, regulate PH to 1～2, after proton exchange about 24h, then neutralize this solution, sucking filtration is also After removing solvent, obtain polyimide modified graphene oxide；

Number used by above material is weight portion.

In one embodiment, described sulfonated diamine is selected from 4,4'-diamino-diphenyl-2,2'-disulfonic acid, 4,4'-

Diaminourea-3,3'-dimethyl diphenyl methane-2,2'-disulfonic acid, 4,4'-diaminourea-2,2', 3,3'-dimethyl two Phenylmethane-2,2'-disulfonic acid, 4,4'-diaminourea-2,2'-dimethyl diphenyl-2,2'-disulfonic acid, 4,4'-diaminourea-3,3'- Dimethyl diphenyl-2,2'-disulfonic acid, 4,4'-benzidine-3,3'-disulfonic acid, 2,6'-diaminostilbene, 3,5-trimethylbenzene Sulfonic acid, 3,5-diamino benzene sulfonic acid, 4,4'-diaminodiphenyl ether-2,2'-disulfonic acid, 3,4'-diaminodiphenyl ether-2,3'-two Sulfonic acid, 4,4'-diaminostilbene ' ', 3'' bis-phenoxy group benzene-5''-sulfonic acid, 3,3'-diaminostilbene ' ', 3''-bis-phenoxy group benzene- 5''-sulfonic acid, 9,9'-double (4-aminophenyl) fluorenes-2,7'-disulfonic acid, 4,4'-diaminourea-4'', 4'''-bis-aminophenoxy biphenyl- 3'', 3'''-disulfonic acid, 4,4'-diaminourea-4'', 4'''-bis-phenoxy groups-diphenyl isopropyl alkane-5'', 5'''-disulfonic acid or 4,4'-diaminostilbene ' ', 4''-bis-phenoxy groups-benzene-2''-sulfonic acid, 2,2 '-bis-(4-sulfonic benzo epoxide) biphenyl sulfonated diamines, Any one or more in 3,3 '-bis-(4-sulfonic benzo epoxide) biphenyl sulfonated diamines；Preferably, described sulfonated diamine is side Chain, and selected from 9, double (4-aminophenyl) fluorenes-2 of 9'-, 7'-disulfonic acid, 2,2 '-bis-(phenoxy group) biphenyl sulfonated diamines, 3, In 3 '-bis-(phenoxy group) biphenyl sulfonated diamines any one；It is highly preferred that described sulfonated diamine is 3,3 '-bis-(phenoxy groups) connection Benzene sulfonated diamine.

In one embodiment, described dianhydride selected from pyromellitic dianhydride, 3,4,9,10-tetracarboxylic anhydrides, 4,4'- (hexafluoro isopropyl alkene) two anhydride phthalic acids, dicyclo [2.2.2] octyl-7-alkene-2,3,5,6-tetracarboxylic dianhydride, 3,3', 4,4'-benzophenone Any one or more in tetracarboxylic acid dianhydride, 1,4,5,8 naphthalenetetracarboxylic acid dianhydride；Preferably, described dianhydride is selected from 3,4,9, One in 10-tetracarboxylic anhydride and 1,4,5,8 naphthalenetetracarboxylic acid dianhydride or a combination of both；It is highly preferred that described dianhydride is 1,4,5,8 naphthalenetetracarboxylic acid dianhydride.

In one is preferably carried out mode, described graphene oxide is netted.

C1: polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex, its preparation method is:

(1) polyquaternary ammonium salt is prepared

In 100ml three-necked bottle, add dibenzyl bromide 0.1mol, Isosorbide-5-Nitrae-lupetazin 0.08mol and solvent N, Dinethylformamide 50ml, after reacting 15 hours at 50 DEG C, decompression distillation is removed solvent and is obtained polyquaternary ammonium salt；

In 100ml three-necked bottle, add chitosan 0.1 mol and the polyquaternary ammonium salt 0.01mol of above-mentioned synthesis, under room temperature After stirring；Weigh the sodium hydroxide of 0. 1mol and with after water dissolution, add said mixture, at 50 DEG C, react 12 little Shi Hou, after neutralizing with hydrobromic acid and using ethanol cyclic washing, sucking filtration is also dried to obtain polyquaternary ammonium salt modification of chitosan；

The isophorone diisocyanate of 0.027 mole is dissolved in the toluene of 20mL, obtains diisocyanate solution, so After 0.016 mole of glycerol is dissolved in 20mL dimethyl sulphoxide solution, obtain trihydroxylic alcohol solution, then by molten for described trihydroxylic alcohol Liquid joins in the there-necked flask of band magnetic agitation and reflux, 40 DEG C, nitrogen protection under, the most wherein It is slowly added to the toluene solution of described isophorone diisocyanate；

After dripping, system continues to react 10h at 40 DEG C, then adds the phenol of 0.002 mole in reaction medium, Heating, reacts 5h at 100 DEG C；

After reaction terminates, reduce pressure distilling off solvent.Products therefrom methanol-oxolane (volume ratio (1/10)) dissolving, Settle 3 times, filter, 60 DEG C of vacuum drying 24h, obtain super branched polyurethane；

In 100ml three-necked bottle, add the polyquaternary ammonium salt modification of chitosan 0.1 gram of above-mentioned synthesis, super branched polyurethane 0.2 Gram and DMF 50ml, room temperature under stir after；After reacting 10 hours at 60 DEG C, heavy in methanol Fall and filtration, obtain polyquaternary ammonium salt-chitosan-super branched polyurethane complex.

Method of testing

The sheet stock obtaining step C in above-described embodiment 1～7 and comparative example 1 ~ 3 is tested, and method of testing is as follows:

Tensile property: hot strength and elongation at break are measured according to JIS K6251.

Rebound performance: according to JIS K6251, by made sample repeated stretching 100 times, tensile elongation is five times of former state, And calculate its longitudinal absolute deformation amount and assess.

Anti-microbial property: be measured according to Japanese Industrial Standards JIS Z2801.

Antibacterial stability: be immersed in the water of 80 DEG C by made sample, after one week, tests the loss of its antibacterial activity value Amount, its computational methods are: activity value loss amount=(test escherichia coli antibacterial activity after front escherichia coli antibacterial activity value-test Value) the front escherichia coli antibacterial activity value of/test.

Fire resistance: be measured according to UL94 standard.

高温轻质热绝缘水泥和二氧化硅基材料

section.content: 种高温轻质热绝缘材料由包含水泥或硅砂、水和发泡剂的混合物形成。所述发泡剂可以为铝粉或表面活性剂。所述保温材料具有大于约600℃的最大使用温度。

A high temperature lightweight thermal insulating material is formed from a mixture that includes cement or silica sand, water and a foaming agent. The foaming agent can be an aluminum powder or a surfactant. The insulating material has a maximum use temperature greater than about 600 degrees Celsius.

High temperature lightweight heat insulation cement and silica-based materialsInvention field

This patent disclosure relates generally to field of compound material, and more particularly, to high temperature lightweight heat insulation Cement and silica-based materials.

Background technology

Nothing.

Summary of the invention

The invention provides a kind of height formed by the mixture comprising cement or silica sand, water and foaming agent Temperature lightweight heat insulation cement or silica-based materials (" insulation material ").Foaming agent can be aluminium powder Or surfactant.Insulation material has the maximum use temperature of greater than about 600 DEG C.Common when using During portland cement (Ordinary Portland cement, OPC), maximum use temperature can be up to About 900 DEG C.When using silica sand, maximum use temperature can be up to about 1000 DEG C.When using aluminic acid During calcium cement (CAC), maximum use temperature can be up to about 1800 DEG C.

It addition, the invention provides a kind of by the amount of comprising be about the cement of 25 to 90% weight in wet bases or silica sand, The insulation material that the mixture of water and foaming agent that amount is about 10 to 70% weight in wet bases is formed.Foaming agent can By the aluminium powder that the amount of being is in terms of the weight of cement or silica sand about 0.5 to 3.0%, or amount is for water The surfactant of weight meter about 0.05 to 2.0%.Insulation material has the maximum of greater than about 600 DEG C Temperature, scope is used to be about 0.1 to 1.0g/cm3Density, scope be about 0.05 to 0.30W/ (m K) Thermal conductivity and scope be about the compressive strength of 30 to 3000PSI (2.068 to 206.8 bar).

Additionally, the invention provides a kind of method manufacturing insulation material, including: by cement or silica sand Mix with water, use foaming agent to be foamed by mixture, the mixture of foaming is poured in mould and makes The mixture of foaming rises to form insulation material, and is removed from mould by insulation material.Thermal insulating material Material can be cured or heat treatment.Insulation material has the maximum use temperature of greater than about 600 DEG C.

Additionally, the invention provides a kind of method manufacturing insulation material, including: amount is about 25 The water being about 10 to 70% weight in wet bases to the cement of 90% weight in wet base or silica sand with amount mixes, and uses foaming agent (amount for count with the weight of cement or silica sand about 0.5 to 3.0% aluminium powder or amount in terms of the weight of water about The surfactant of 0.05 to 2.0%) mixture is foamed, the mixture of foaming is poured in mould And make the mixture of foaming increase to form insulation material, and insulation material is removed from mould.Protect Adiabator can be cured or heat treatment.Insulation material have greater than about 600 DEG C maximum use temperature, Scope is about 0.1 to 1.0g/cm3Density, scope be about the thermal conductivity of 0.05 to 0.30W/ (m K) With the compressive strength that scope is about 30 to 3000PSI (2.068 to 206.8 bar).

The present invention is described in detail below with reference to accompanying drawing.

The brief description of accompanying drawing

Detailed Description Of The Invention

Portland cement (OPC) or aluminous cement (CAC), adding before it condenses Under hygrometric state added with water, can bubble with the aluminium powder of reaction or use surfactant.By adding more The aluminum of a large amount or surfactant, wet stock foams to a greater degree, then its weight will be lighter, and As a result, condense and the material that is dried will more be incubated.Condense and dried, when based on OPC, protect Adiabator would have up to the maximum use temperature of about 900 DEG C, and when based on CAC, insulation Material would have up to the maximum use temperature of about 1800 DEG C.

The aluminium powder of reaction can used or by using table with the silica sand in the mixture of water and calcium oxide Face activating agent bubbles.By adding aluminum or the surfactant of higher amount, wet stock is to a greater degree Foaming, then its weight will be lighter, and result, condense and the material that is dried will more be incubated.Gel, Foaming, condense, autoclaving and dried, insulation material would have up to the maximum of about 1000 DEG C Use temperature.

Cement or silica sand binding agent can be with multiple additives material such as sand, Gypsum Fibrosum, silicon ash (silica Fume), pyrogenic silica, Gypsum Fibrosum preparata (plaster of Paris), flying dust, slag, rock, fiber (such as, glass fibre, cellulose fibre, vinal, polypropylene fibre or a combination thereof) Etc. being used in combination.Noting, first silica sand is milled to less than 100 microns as wet pulp in ball mill Fineness.

In order to prepare cement or the silicon dioxide aqueous mixtures of foaming, water leads to the scope of the ratio of solid It is often by weight 0.2 to 2.0.When the relatively low water that range is 0.2 to 1.0 and solids ratios During foaming mixture, can be cement or the conventional high-performance of silica sand weight 0.25-4.0% by addition These mixture are prepared as being more easy to stream by water reducer (high range water reducer, HRWR) Move.

In one embodiment, the mixture (cement-water or silicon dioxide-water) of foaming leads to sometimes Cross interpolation rheology modifier to stablize.Rheology modifier is generally with cement or the 0.1 to 5% of silica sand weight Amount add.

Rheology modifier falls into following kind: (1) many carbohydrates and their derivative；(2) protein and spreading out Biological；(3) organic material synthesized.Polysaccharide rheology modifier can be further subdivided into: (a) Cellulosic-based material and derivant thereof；(b) starch-based material and derivant thereof；(c) other are many Sugar.

The cellulose base rheology modifier being suitable for includes, such as, methyl hydroxyethylcellulose (MHEC), Hydroxymethyl ethylcellulose (HMEC), carboxymethyl cellulose (CMC), methylcellulose (MC), Ethyl cellulose (EC), hydroxyethyl cellulose (HEC), hydroxyethylpropyl cellulose (HEPC) With hydroxypropyl methyl cellulose (HPMC) etc..

The starch-based material being suitable for includes, such as, and wheaten starch, pregelatinised wheaten starch, Ma Ling Sweet potato starch, pregelatinised potato starch, amylopectin, amylose, sea gel (seagel), Starch acetate, h and E starch, ionic starch, chain alkyl starch, dextrin, amine starch, Phosphate ester starch and dialdehyde starch.

Currently preferred rheology modifier is hydroxypropyl methyl cellulose, and the example is Methocel 240 With Methocel 240S.

When using aluminum as foaming agent, the particle diameter of aluminum is usually less than 100 microns.Aluminum can be as dry Powder or add as with the paste of the mixture of water or diethylene glycol, and some are applied, also Can use with the form postponed.Preferably aluminum is purchased from Eckart company (German company).Logical Often, in terms of the weight of cement or silica sand, aluminum adds with the amount of 0.05-3%.

When OPC cement-based mixture is foamed, adding aluminum under mixing with 5 seconds to 1 minutes Afterwards, first water and cement are carried out the mixing of 1-5 minute.When to CAC cement-based mixture During foaming, at the oxygen of the amount of 0.5 to 10% added under mixing with water weight with 5 seconds to 1 minutes Change calcium, calcium hydroxide, sodium hydroxide or the material of similar raising pH and last with 5 seconds to 1 After minute under mixing adding aluminum, first water, cement and rheology modifier are carried out 1-5 and divide The mixing of clock.When silica sand based mixtures is foamed, adding under mixing with 1-5 minute with water weight The calcium oxide of amount, calcium hydroxide, sodium hydroxide or the similar raising pH's of the 0.5 to 40% of amount Material and last with after 5 seconds to 1 minutes under mixing addition aluminum, first to water, sand and Rheology modifier (when deployed) carries out the mixing of 1-5 minute.

After mixing, mixture is poured in the mold system of the shape that can be pipe, semicanal or block And allow mixture to rise (owing to forming hydrogen gas bubbles along with aluminum with hydrionic reaction) and under connecing It is full of this mould in the 0.5-2 hour period come.

When using of surfactants as foaming agent, preferably select and there is height foam stability and product The surfactant of raw appropriate Air Bubble Size.A kind of such air entraining agent is sold by company Sika.Table Face activating agent generally adds with the amount of the 0.05 to 2.0% of water weight.When to OPC or CAC cement During based mixtures foaming, water, cement, surfactant and rheology modifier generally mix 1 to 10 Minute so that mixture bubble.When to have surfactant silica sand based mixtures foam time, with The amount of 0.5 to 40% added under mixing with water weight for 1-5 minute add calcium oxide, calcium hydroxide, Sodium hydroxide or the material of similar raising pH and last added table under mixing with 1 to 10 minute After the activating agent of face, first water, sand and rheology modifier are carried out the mixing of 1-5 minute, from And make mixture bubble.After mixing, the mixture of foaming is poured in mold system.

After cement-based mixture is hardened, wet stock will be demolded, it is possible to cut, repair, Sand milling or route become the shape (such as, pipe, semicanal, block, plate etc.) of regulation.At silicon dioxide Based mixtures gel after forming enough wet strengths (2 to 10 hours) in mold system is wet Material is demolded, it is possible to cut, and (such as, finishing, sand milling or route become the shape of regulation Pipe, semicanal, block, plate etc.).

In order to form final 28 days intensity of the product by OPC cement production systD, or make product at tide Wet environment stands 28 days, or can be by by its internal thermally developing or by the most in the art Conventional steam cure heats and makes strength development be accelerated in 24-48 hour and complete.

The product prepared by CAC cement will reach its final strength in 24 hours, and need not Extra solidification.

The product prepared by silica sand is at the temperature of 150-200 DEG C and the pressure of 10-20 bar, at high pressure Still is placed 15-48 hour to form final strength.The silicon dioxide of gelling is changed into by this process Cement reactor product hydrated calcium silicate and the eakleite of intensity are provided.

After realizing final strength development, it is dried this product and is combined to form final light thermal-insulation Material.The composite of hardening can be cut, and finishing, sand milling or route become the shape (example of regulation As, pipe, semicanal, block, plate etc.).

In one embodiment, can be by spraying this product with to water base or solvent base silane Whole product carries out water-proofing treatment.Such product is generally sold by BASF.
